about_quotes.speaker: Carmen Lundy
about_quotes.evidence: Let’s pull up what you did and let’s see if we can take your plug-ins and somehow I’ll mix it with, you know, with Wallace Roney © Fillius Jazz Archive -15- Junior or with Gifton Garrett — I mean Giveton Gelin — and let’s see what that sounds like just to have them both.
about_quotes.doc_title: Carmen Lundy interviewed by Monk Rowe, via Zoom, February 15, 2023
